checks.title: Runtime database URL
checks.summary: Runtime DATABASE_URL is missing or still points to a placeholder/local endpoint.

checks.title: Migration database URL
checks.summary: DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED is missing or still points to a placeholder/local endpoint.

checks.title: Environment-safe secrets
checks.summary: One or more auth/session secrets are missing or still use placeholder values.

checks.title: Persistent document storage
checks.summary: Persistent storage is not fully configured; expected local_file mode with a storage root.

checks.title: Staging-safe notification delivery
checks.summary: Email/SMS delivery is not fully mocked; staging may still require additional delivery safeguards.

checks.title: Seeded enterprise users
checks.summary: Missing seeded enterprise users: Platform Admin, Legal Affairs User, Doctor User, Nurse User, Medical Director User, Compliance User, Finance / Authorized Admin User, External Reviewer, Read-Only Auditor, Quality Manager, Risk Officer.

checks.title: Role, membership, and tenant mappings
checks.summary: Seeded enterprise users have matching tenant, role, membership, and role-assignment state.

checks.title: Navigation visibility
checks.summary: Each enterprise role resolves to the expected module navigation surface.

checks.title: Workflow / approval / audit authority
checks.summary: Authority mismatches detected for: Medical Director User, Finance / Authorized Admin User.

checks.title: Enterprise workflow cases
checks.summary: Expected at least four seeded enterprise workflow cases.

checks.title: Workflow states and approvals
checks.summary: Workflow state or approval coverage is incomplete for seeded enterprise flows.

checks.title: Delegation and escalation scenarios
checks.summary: Delegation scenarios are missing from the enterprise seed data.

checks.title: Audit, document, and notification evidence
checks.summary: Seeded audit, document, or notification evidence is incomplete.

checks.title: Validation base URL
checks.summary: No VALIDATION_BASE_URL or APP_BASE_URL was configured for live UAT checks.

checks.title: Foreign key / relationship connectivity probe
checks.summary: Runtime or migration database probes failed; controlled staging deployment should remain blocked.

checks.title: Workflow / approval persistence
checks.summary: Workflow states or approval relationships are incomplete in the staging database.

checks.title: Audit event integrity
checks.summary: Audit event integrity checks failed for the seeded enterprise dataset.

checks.title: Tenant isolation and permission mappings
checks.summary: Seeded enterprise users remain isolated to their intended tenants with role assignments in place.

checks.title: Soft delete behavior
checks.summary: Soft delete markers were not detected in the sampled enterprise workflow tables; confirm operational policy before rollout.

checks.title: Mobile QA target
checks.summary: Mobile QA checks were skipped because no live base URL was configured.

checks.title: Immutable finalized documents
checks.summary: Immutable finalized document coverage is insufficient for legal evidence certification.

checks.title: QR and evidence package references
checks.summary: QR reference coverage is incomplete in the seeded legal evidence packages.

checks.title: Signature and timestamp evidence
checks.summary: Signature evidence is incomplete for the seeded enterprise documents.

checks.title: Audit defensibility
checks.summary: Document or audit-chain coverage is incomplete for legal evidence defensibility.

checks.title: Database query performance
checks.summary: Database latency was not measured because the staging database was unavailable.

checks.title: Workflow / session latency
checks.summary: Authenticated login latency was not measured because live UAT checks were skipped.

checks.title: PDF generation speed
checks.summary: PDF generation latency was not measured during the current validation run.

checks.title: Dashboard rendering readiness
checks.summary: Dashboard/module route latency was not measured during the current validation run.
